devourer.description: Harnesses the power of the void to crush their enemies and feast on their souls. Preferred Weapons: Warglaives, Swords, Axes, Fist Weapons.

nodes.name: Vengeful Retreat
nodes.description: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 5 Physical damage.

nodes.name: Voidblade
nodes.description: Unleash your glaives and charge to your target, dealing 858 Cosmic damage.

nodes.name: Sigil of Misery
nodes.description:
Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Vengeful Bonds
nodes.description: Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by 70% for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Unrestrained Fury
nodes.description: Increases maximum Fury by 20.

nodes.name: Shattered Restoration
nodes.description: The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Improved Sigil of Misery
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of Misery by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Bouncing Glaives
nodes.description: Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.

nodes.name: Imprison
nodes.description: Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.

nodes.name: Charred Warblades
nodes.description: You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.

nodes.name: Void Nova
nodes.description: Unleash an eruption of void energy, dealing 104 Cosmic damage and stunning your target and all nearby enemies for 2 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Disrupt
nodes.description: Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.

nodes.name: Consume Magic
nodes.description: Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target.

nodes.name: Aldrachi Design
nodes.description: Increases your chance to parry by 3%.

nodes.name: Focused Ire
nodes.description: The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.

choices.name: Master of the Glaive
choices.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.

choices.name: Champion of the Glaive
choices.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.

nodes.name: Disrupting Fury
nodes.description: Disrupt generates 30 Fury on a successful interrupt.

nodes.name: Blazing Path
nodes.description: Shift gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Swallowed Anger
nodes.description: Consume Magic generates 20 Fury when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.

nodes.name: Aura of Pain
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.

nodes.name: Live by the Glaive
nodes.description:
When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and 10 Fury. 

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

nodes.name: Pursuit
nodes.description: Mastery increases your movement speed.

nodes.name: Soul Rending
nodes.description:
Leech increased by 5%.

Gain an additional 5% leech while Metamorphosis is active.

nodes.name: Felfire Haste
nodes.description: Fel Rush increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Infernal Armor
nodes.description: Immolation Aura increases your armor by 10% and causes melee attackers to suffer 2 Fire damage.

choices.name: Burn It Out
choices.description: Immolation Aura removes 1 Disease effect.

choices.name: Soul Cleanse
choices.description: Immolation Aura removes 1 Curse effect.

nodes.name: Lost in Darkness
nodes.description: Spectral Sight has 5 sec reduced cooldown and no longer reduces movement speed.

nodes.name: Illidari Knowledge
nodes.description: Reduces magic damage taken by 3%.

nodes.name: Guile
nodes.description: The cast range of Voidblade, Consume Magic, and Disrupt are increased by 20 yds.

nodes.name: Will of the Illidari
nodes.description: Increases maximum health by 3%.

nodes.name: Internal Struggle
nodes.description: Increases your mastery by 2.6%.

nodes.name: Furious
nodes.description: Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.

nodes.name: Remorseless
nodes.description: Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.

nodes.name: First In, Last Out
nodes.description: Shift grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Erratic Felheart
nodes.description: The cooldown of Fel Rush is reduced by 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Final Breath
nodes.description: Fully channeling Void Ray increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

nodes.name: Darkness
nodes.description:
Summons darkness around you in an 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec.

Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.

nodes.name: Demon Muzzle
nodes.description: Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Soul Splitter
nodes.description: Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 2% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.

nodes.name: Wings of Wrath
nodes.description: Glide speed increased by 10%.

choices.name: Long Night
choices.description: Increases the duration of Darkness by 3 sec.

choices.name: Pitch Black
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.

nodes.name: Demonic Resilience
nodes.description: Blur gains 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Void Ray
nodes.description:
Requires 100 Fury
Unleash a beam of concentrated void energy, dealing 77 Cosmic damage and consuming 5 Fury every 0.1 sec.

Effect ends after 2.7 sec or upon reaching 0 Fury.

nodes.name: Soul Immolation
nodes.description: Light your soul aflame, healing yourself for 24% of your maximum health, generating 30 Fury and shattering 3 Soul Fragments over 5 sec.

nodes.name: Predator's Thirst
nodes.description:
Consume damage increased by 15%.

Consume generates a Soul Fragment.

choices.name: Tempered Soul
choices.description: The cooldown of Soul Immolation is reduced by 30 sec and it gains 1 additional charge.

choices.name: Spontaneous Immolation
choices.description: Soul Immolation heals for an additional 4% of your health over its duration and its cooldown is reset upon killing an enemy that yields experience or honor.

nodes.name: Void Metamorphosis
nodes.description:
Collecting 50 Soul Fragments grants access to Void Metamorphosis.

 Void Metamorphosis
Requires 50 Soul Fragments

You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.

nodes.name: Feast of Souls
nodes.description: Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

choices.name: Scythe's Embrace
choices.description: Reap now generates 10 Fury.

choices.name: Duty Eternal
choices.description: Voidblade damage increased by 100% and Voidblade now generates 20 Fury.

nodes.name: Collapsing Star
nodes.description:
While in Void Metamorphosis, every 30 Soul Fragments harvested grants access to Collapsing Star.

 Collapsing Star
Channel an immense amount of void energy into a single, cataclysmic blast, dealing 2,121 Cosmic damage to your target and 1,619 Cosmic damage to all nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

While casting Collapsing Star, your Fury drain is significantly reduced.

nodes.name: Moment of Craving
nodes.description: After fully channeling Void Ray, the cooldown of Reap is reset and your next Reap will collect up to 6 additional Soul Fragments.

nodes.name: Gift of the Void
nodes.description: Your critical strike chance is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Entropy
nodes.description:
While in combat, generate 1 Soul Fragment every 12 sec.

While out of combat, you will slowly build towards your Void Metamorphosis, up to 25 Soul Fragments.

nodes.name: Waste Not
nodes.description: Damage from Void Ray has a 200% increased chance to generate a Soul Fragment.

nodes.name: Soulshaper
nodes.description: Each Soul Fragment gathered by Reap increases its damage by 8%.

nodes.name: Demonsurge
nodes.description:
Void Metamorphosis now also greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash.

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing 2,361 Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Singed Spirit
nodes.description: Soul Immolation generates an additional 12 Fury over its duration.

nodes.name: Sweet Suffering
nodes.description:
The duration of Feast of Souls is increased by 1 sec.

 Feast of Souls
Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: Second Helping
nodes.description: Reap gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Umbral Blade
nodes.description: Reap's cooldown is reduced by your Haste.

nodes.name: Improved Consume
nodes.description: Consume deals 10% increased damage and its cast time is reduced by 0.25 sec.

nodes.name: Sweet Release
nodes.description: Your chance to shatter a Soul Fragment from enemies you damage is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Voidpurge
nodes.description: Void Ray's cooldown during Void Metamorphosis is reduced by 2.0 sec.

choices.name: Wave of Debilitation
choices.description: Chaos Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades.

choices.name: Pursuit of Angriness
choices.description: Movement speed increased by 1% per 10 Fury.

nodes.name: Focused Hatred
nodes.description:
Voidsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.

choices.name: Set Fire to the Pain
choices.description:
5% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over 6 sec.

Fire damage taken reduced by 10%.

choices.name: Improved Soul Rending
choices.description: Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Void Metamorphosis is active.

nodes.name: Blind Focus
nodes.description:
Cosmic damage increased by 2%.

Effect is doubled while in demon form.

nodes.name: Hungering Slash
nodes.description:
After dealing damage with The Hunt or Voidblade, Voidblade is replaced with Hungering Slash for 6 sec.

 Hungering Slash
Violently slash your scythe around you, dealing 940 Cosmic damage to nearby enemies and generating 10 Fury. Shatters up to 2 Soul Fragments from nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Hungering Slash grants a temporary charge of Vengeful Retreat and causes your next Vengeful Retreat within 6 sec to deal an additional 570 Cosmic damage.

nodes.name: Voidrage
nodes.description: Your Mastery is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Focused Ray
nodes.description: Void Ray deals 80% more damage when damaging 3 targets.

nodes.name: Burning Blades
nodes.description:
Your blades burn with Cosmic energy, causing your Voidblade, Hungering Slash, and Throw Glaive to deal an additional 35% damage as Cosmic damage.

Reap damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Violent Transformation
nodes.description:
Entering Void Metamorphosis resets the cooldown of Voidblade and The Hunt.

The Hunt deals 25% increased damage and resets the cooldown of Soul Immolation.

nodes.name: Enduring Torment
nodes.description: The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.

nodes.name: Undying Embers
nodes.description: Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.

nodes.name: Soulforged Blades
nodes.description: Hungering Slash and Voidblade's critical strike chance is increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Singular Strikes
nodes.description:
Voidblade damage increased by 25%.

Hungering Slash deals 50% increased damage to its primary target.

nodes.name: Demonic Instinct
nodes.description: Void Ray and Hungering Slash damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Devourer's Edge
nodes.description: Reap and Consume damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Voidglare Boon
nodes.description: After fully channeling Void Ray, gain 10 Fury.

nodes.name: Rolling Torment
nodes.description: When Void Metamorphosis expires, for each unused Soul you harvested, gain 5 Fury and increase your damage by 0.50% for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Untethered Fury
nodes.description: Maximum Fury increased by 20.

choices.name: Student of Suffering
choices.description: Void Ray applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by 10.6% and granting 5 Fury every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

choices.name: Flamebound
choices.description: Hungering Slash has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.

nodes.name: Monster Rising
nodes.description: Intellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.

nodes.name: Volatile Instinct
nodes.description: Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay.

nodes.name: Voidrush
nodes.description:
Collapsing Star reduces the cooldown of Voidblade by 10 sec.

Voidblade and The Hunt briefly reduce your Fury drain while in Void Metamorphosis.

nodes.name: Devourer's Bite
nodes.description: Damage from Voidblade and the Hunt increases the damage your target takes from you by 12% for 10 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: Impending Apocalypse
nodes.description: Each Collapsing Star you cast increases the damage of your next Collapsing Star by 30%.

nodes.name: Calamitous
nodes.description: Your damaging critical strikes deal 240% damage instead of the usual 200%.

nodes.name: Star Fragments
nodes.description: Collapsing Star now generates 3 Soul Fragments.

nodes.name: Demonic Intensity
nodes.description:
Activating Void Metamorphosis greatly empowers The Hunt.

Voidsurge damage is increased by 10% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.

nodes.name: The Hunt
nodes.description: Charge to your target, striking them for 2,283 Cosmic damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting 1,628 Cosmic damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

choices.name: Emptiness
choices.description: Every soul consumed in Void Metamorphosis grants 0.25% haste, up to 25%.

choices.name: Soul Glutton
choices.description:
Void Metamorphosis requires 15 less souls.

Your Fury drains 25% faster while in Void Metamorphosis.

nodes.name: Eradicate
nodes.description:
Fully channeling Void Ray upgrades your Reap to Eradicate.

 Eradicate
Slam your Scythe to the ground, dealing 2,558 Cosmic damage to your primary target and 2,558 to all other enemies within a 25 yd cone in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Eradicate gathers up to 4 nearby souls.

ranks.description:
All Cosmic damage dealt increased by 3%.

Collapsing Star's critical strike damage is increased by 50% of your critical strike chance.
Entering Void Metamorphosis causes your soul to erupt, generating 5 Soul Fragments and granting immediate access to Collapsing Star.

nodes.name: World Killer
nodes.description: The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and generates 1 Soul Fragment.

nodes.name: Otherworldly Focus
nodes.description:
Collapsing Star and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.

nodes.name: Dark Matter
nodes.description: Your first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing 2,304 Cosmic damage over 6 sec.

nodes.name: Final Hour
nodes.description: Passive bonuses granted by each stack of Voidfall persist for 8 sec after being consumed.

nodes.name: Meteoric Fall
nodes.description: While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.

nodes.name: Mass Acceleration
nodes.description: Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Reap upon activating Void Metamorphosis.

choices.name: Path to Oblivion
choices.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 3% increased movement speed.

choices.name: State of Matter
choices.description: Shift has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Voidfall
nodes.description:
Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.

Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing 673 Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Doomsayer
choices.description: Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.

choices.name: Harness the Cosmos
choices.description: Voidfall Meteor damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Celestial Echoes
nodes.description: Consume generates 2 additional Fury and deals 15% increased damage.

nodes.name: Phase Shift
nodes.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% reduced damage taken.

nodes.name: Catastrophe
nodes.description: Enemies struck by a Voidfall Meteor take an additional 25% damage over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Swift Erasure
nodes.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% Haste.

nodes.name: Meteoric Rise
nodes.description:
Void Ray damage increased by 15%.

Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.

nodes.name: Monster Rising
nodes.description: Intellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.

nodes.name: Blind Focus
nodes.description:
Cosmic damage increased by 2%.

Effect is doubled while in demon form.

nodes.name: Enduring Torment
nodes.description: The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.

choices.name: Student of Suffering
choices.description: Void Ray applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by 10.6% and granting 5 Fury every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

choices.name: Flamebound
choices.description: Hungering Slash has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.

nodes.name: Undying Embers
nodes.description: Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.

nodes.name: Untethered Fury
nodes.description: Maximum Fury increased by 20.

nodes.name: Volatile Instinct
nodes.description: Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay.

Reap damage increased by 20%.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.

choices.description: Movement speed increased by 1% per 10 Fury.

nodes.name: Dash of Chaos
nodes.description: For 2 sec after using Fel Rush, activating it again will dash back towards your initial location.

nodes.name: Improved Chaos Strike
nodes.description: Chaos Strike damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: First Blood
nodes.description: Blade Dance deals 96 Chaos damage to the first target struck.

nodes.name: Accelerated Blade
nodes.description: Throw Glaive deals 60% increased damage, reduced by 30% for each previous enemy hit.

nodes.name: Demon Hide
nodes.description: Magical damage increased by 3%, and Physical damage taken reduced by 5%.

nodes.description: Maximum Fury increased by 20.

nodes.name: Desperate Instincts
nodes.description:
Blur now reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

Additionally, damage taken below 35% Health is reduced by 10%.

choices.name: Deflecting Dance
choices.description: You deflect incoming attacks while Blade Dancing, absorbing damage up to 15% of your maximum health.

choices.name: Mortal Dance
choices.description: Blade Dance now reduces targets' healing received by 50% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Demonic Intensity
nodes.description:
Activating Void Metamorphosis greatly empowers The Hunt.

Voidsurge damage is increased by 10% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.

nodes.name: Initiative
nodes.description:
Damaging an enemy before they damage you increases your critical strike chance by 10% for 5 sec.

Vengeful Retreat refreshes your potential to trigger this effect on any enemies you are in combat with.

nodes.name: Scars of Suffering
nodes.description: Increases Versatility by 4% and reduces threat generated by 8%.

nodes.name: Demonic
nodes.description: Eye Beam causes you to enter demon form for 5 sec after it finishes dealing damage.

nodes.name: Furious Throws
nodes.description: Throw Glaive now costs 25 Fury and throws a second glaive at the target.

nodes.name: Trail of Ruin
nodes.description: The final slash of Blade Dance inflicts an additional 25 Chaos damage over 4 sec.

nodes.name: Voidfall
nodes.description:
Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.

Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing 676 Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Tactical Retreat
nodes.description: Vengeful Retreat has a 5 sec reduced cooldown and generates 80 Fury over 10 sec.

nodes.name: Blind Fury
nodes.description: Eye Beam generates 15 Fury every second, has 10% increased duration, and deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Furious Gaze
nodes.description: When Eye Beam finishes fully channeling, your Haste is increased by an additional 8% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Dancing with Fate
nodes.description: The final slash of Blade Dance deals an additional 25% damage.

nodes.name: Growing Inferno
nodes.description: Immolation Aura's damage increases by 10% each time it deals damage.

nodes.name: Swift Erasure
nodes.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% Haste.

nodes.name: Meteoric Rise
nodes.description:
Void Ray damage increased by 15%.

Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.

nodes.name: Catastrophe
nodes.description: Enemies struck by a Voidfall Meteor take an additional 25% damage over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Phase Shift
nodes.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% reduced damage taken.

choices.name: Exergy
choices.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat increase your damage by 5% for 20 sec.

choices.name: Inertia
choices.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat cause your next Fel Rush or Felblade to empower you, increasing damage by 18% for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Isolated Prey
nodes.description:
Chaos Nova, Eye Beam, and Immolation Aura gain bonuses when striking 1 target.

 Chaos Nova:
Stun duration increased by 2 sec.

 Eye Beam:
Deals 30% increased damage.

 Immolation Aura:
Always critically strikes.

nodes.name: The Hunt
nodes.description: Charge to your target, striking them for 238 Chaos damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting 168 Chaos damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

nodes.name: Serrated Glaive
nodes.description: Enemies hit by Chaos Strike or Throw Glaive take 15% increased damage from Chaos Strike and Throw Glaive for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Burning Wound
nodes.description:
Demon's Bite and Throw Glaive leave open wounds on your enemies, dealing 25 Chaos damage over 15 sec and increasing damage taken from your Immolation Aura by 35%.

May be applied to up to 3 targets.

choices.name: Path to Oblivion
choices.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 3% increased movement speed.

choices.name: State of Matter
choices.description: Shift has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Mass Acceleration
nodes.description: Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Reap upon activating Void Metamorphosis.

choices.name: Doomsayer
choices.description: Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.

choices.name: Harness the Cosmos
choices.description: Voidfall Meteor damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Celestial Echoes
nodes.description: Consume generates 2 additional Fury and deals 15% increased damage.

nodes.name: Unbound Chaos
nodes.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat increase the damage of your next Fel Rush or Felblade by 300%. Lasts 12 sec.

nodes.name: Chaos Theory
nodes.description: Blade Dance causes your next Chaos Strike within 8 sec to have a 14-30% increased critical strike chance and will always refund Fury.

choices.name: Inner Demon
choices.description: Entering demon form causes your next Chaos Strike to unleash your inner demon, causing it to crash into your target and deal 74 Chaos damage to all nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

choices.name: Chaotic Transformation
choices.description: When you activate Metamorphosis, the cooldowns of Blade Dance and Eye Beam are immediately reset.

choices.name: Relentless Onslaught
choices.description: Chaos Strike has a 10% chance to trigger a second Chaos Strike.

choices.name: Soulscar
choices.description: Throw Glaive causes targets to take an additional 80% of damage dealt as Chaos over 6 sec.

nodes.name: Ragefire
nodes.description:
Each time Immolation Aura deals damage, 35% of the damage dealt by up to 3 critical strikes is gathered as Ragefire.

When Immolation Aura expires you explode, dealing all stored Ragefire damage to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Final Hour
nodes.description: Passive bonuses granted by each stack of Voidfall persist for 8 sec after being consumed.

nodes.name: Meteoric Fall
nodes.description: While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.

nodes.name: Dark Matter
nodes.description: Your first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing 2,304 Cosmic damage over 6 sec.

nodes.name: Otherworldly Focus
nodes.description:
Collapsing Star and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.

nodes.name: Know Your Enemy
nodes.description: Gain critical strike damage equal to 40% of your critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Cycle of Hatred
nodes.description: Activating Eye Beam reduces the cooldown of your next Eye Beam by 2.5 sec, stacking up to 10 sec.

nodes.name: Chaotic Disposition
nodes.description: Your Chaos damage has a 7.77% chance to be increased by 17%, occurring up to 3 total times.

nodes.name: World Killer
nodes.description: The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and generates 1 Soul Fragment.

nodes.name: Essence Break
nodes.description: Slash all enemies in front of you for 110 Chaos damage, causing Chaos Strike and Blade Dance to deal 70 Chaos damage to them for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Glaive Tempest
nodes.description: The final slash of Blade Dance consumes 25 Fury when it strikes 3 or more enemies, launching two demonic glaives in a whirlwind of energy, causing 64 Chaos damage over 3 sec to all nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Shattered Destiny
choices.description: The duration of your active demon form is extended by 0.1 sec per 12 Fury spent.

choices.name: Collective Anguish
choices.description: Eye Beam summons an allied Vengeance Demon Hunter who casts Fel Devastation, dealing 91 Fire damage over 2 sec. Dealing damage heals you for up to 48 health.

nodes.name: Screaming Brutality
nodes.description: Blade Dance automatically triggers Throw Glaive on your primary target for 100% damage and each slash has a 50% chance to Throw Glaive an enemy for 35% damage.

nodes.name: A Fire Inside
nodes.description:
Immolation Aura has 1 additional charge, has 6 sec reduced cooldown, and deals Chaos damage instead of Fire.

You can have multiple Immolation Auras active at a time.

ranks.description: The Hunt empowers your next Eye Beam, increasing damage by 100% and affecting enemies in a wider area.
The Hunt has 15 sec reduced cooldown, deals 15% more damage, and its damage over time effect applies to 2 additional enemies.

Blade Dance damage increased by 20%.

Fully channeling Eye Beam causes your next Blade Dance to refresh its own cooldown.

choices.name: Set Fire to the Pain
choices.description:
5% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over 6 sec.

Fire damage taken reduced by 10%.

choices.name: Improved Soul Rending
choices.description: Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Void Metamorphosis is active.

nodes.name: Demonic Intensity
nodes.description:
Activating Void Metamorphosis greatly empowers The Hunt.

Voidsurge damage is increased by 10% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.

choices.name: Student of Suffering
choices.description: Void Ray applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by 10.6% and granting 5 Fury every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

choices.name: Flamebound
choices.description: Hungering Slash has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.

nodes.name: Untethered Fury
nodes.description: Maximum Fury increased by 20.

nodes.name: Burning Blades
nodes.description:
Your blades burn with Cosmic energy, causing your Voidblade, Hungering Slash, and Throw Glaive to deal an additional 35% damage as Cosmic damage.

Reap damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Monster Rising
nodes.description: Intellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.

nodes.name: Violent Transformation
nodes.description:
Entering Void Metamorphosis resets the cooldown of Voidblade and The Hunt.

The Hunt deals 25% increased damage and resets the cooldown of Soul Immolation.

choices.name: Wave of Debilitation
choices.description: Chaos Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades.

choices.name: Pursuit of Angriness
choices.description: Movement speed increased by 1% per 10 Fury.

nodes.name: Enduring Torment
nodes.description: The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.

nodes.name: Demonsurge
nodes.description:
Void Metamorphosis now also greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash.

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing 2,360 Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Focused Hatred
nodes.description:
Voidsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.

nodes.name: Volatile Instinct
nodes.description: Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay.

nodes.name: Blind Focus
nodes.description:
Cosmic damage increased by 2%.

Effect is doubled while in demon form.

nodes.name: Undying Embers
nodes.description: Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.

nodes.name: Incisive Blade
nodes.description: Soul Cleave deals 10% increased damage.

choices.name: Army Unto Oneself
choices.description: Felblade surrounds you with a Blade Ward, reducing damage taken by 10% for 5 sec.

choices.name: Incorruptible Spirit
choices.description: Each Soul Fragment you consume shields you for an additional 15% of the amount healed.

nodes.name: Wounded Quarry
nodes.description: Expose weaknesses in the target of your Reaver's Mark, causing your Physical damage to any enemy to also deal 30% of the damage dealt to your marked target as Chaos, and sometimes shatter a Soul Fragment.

nodes.name: Fury of the Aldrachi
nodes.description:
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Soul Cleave casts 3 additional glaive slashes to nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

If cast after Shear, cast 6 slashes instead.

nodes.name: Reaver's Mark
nodes.description:
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Shear applies Reaver's Mark, which causes the target to take 7% increased damage for 20 sec. Max 2 stacks.

Applies 1 additional stack of Reaver's Mark If cast after Soul Cleave.

nodes.name: Bladecraft
nodes.description:
Fury of the Aldrachi further empowers Blade Dance when cast after Chaos Strike, increasing slashes to 12.

Reaver's Mark now stacks up to 2 times and further empowers Chaos Strike when cast after Blade Dance, applying an additional stack.

choices.name: Keen Engagement
choices.description: Reaver's Glaive generates 20 Fury.

choices.name: Preemptive Strike
choices.description: Throw Glaive deals 7 Physical damage to enemies near its initial target.

choices.name: Evasive Action
choices.description: Vengeful Retreat can be cast a second time within 3 sec.

choices.name: Unhindered Assault
choices.description: Vengeful Retreat resets the cooldown of Felblade.

nodes.name: Aldrachi Tactics
nodes.description: The second enhanced ability in a pattern shatters an additional Soul Fragment.

nodes.name: Art of the Glaive
nodes.description:
Consuming 20 Soul Fragments or casting Sigil of Spite converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive.

 Reaver's Glaive: 
Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing 134 Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies.
 
Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next Shear and Soul Cleave.

The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage.

nodes.name: Thrill of the Fight
nodes.description: After consuming both enhancements, gain Thrill of the Fight, increasing the damage of your next Reaver's Glaive by 30% and increasing Haste by 8% for 30 sec.

nodes.name: Warblade's Hunger
nodes.description: Consuming a Soul Fragment causes your next Shear to deal 21 additional Physical damage.

nodes.name: Keen Edge
nodes.description: Reaver's Glaive damage is increased by 20% and other Physical-only damage is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Broken Spirit
nodes.description: The Hunt shatters 1 Soul Fragment. Blade Dance and Chaos Strike have a 15% chance to shatter a Soul Fragment.

vengeance.description: Embraces the demon within to incinerate enemies and protect their allies. Preferred Weapons: Warglaives, Swords, Axes, Fist Weapons

nodes.name: Vengeful Retreat
nodes.description: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 5 Physical damage.

nodes.name: Felblade
nodes.description:
Charge to your target and deal 43 Fire damage.

Generates 15 Fury.

nodes.name: Sigil of Misery
nodes.description:
Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Vengeful Bonds
nodes.description: Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by 70% for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Unrestrained Fury
nodes.description: Increases maximum Fury by 20.

nodes.name: Shattered Restoration
nodes.description: The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Improved Sigil of Misery
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of Misery by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Bouncing Glaives
nodes.description: Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.

nodes.name: Imprison
nodes.description: Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.

nodes.name: Charred Warblades
nodes.description: You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.

nodes.name: Chaos Nova
nodes.description: Unleash an eruption of fel energy, dealing 9 Chaos damage and stunning all nearby enemies for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Disrupt
nodes.description: Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.

nodes.name: Consume Magic
nodes.description: Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target.

nodes.name: Aldrachi Design
nodes.description: Increases your chance to parry by 3%.

nodes.name: Focused Ire
nodes.description: The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.

choices.name: Master of the Glaive
choices.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.

choices.name: Champion of the Glaive
choices.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.

nodes.name: Disrupting Fury
nodes.description: Disrupt generates 30 Fury on a successful interrupt.

nodes.name: Blazing Path
nodes.description: Shift gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Swallowed Anger
nodes.description: Consume Magic generates 20 Fury when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.

nodes.name: Aura of Pain
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.

nodes.name: Live by the Glaive
nodes.description:
When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and 10 Fury. 

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

nodes.name: Pursuit
nodes.description: Mastery increases your movement speed.

nodes.name: Soul Rending
nodes.description:
Leech increased by 5%.

Gain an additional 5% leech while Metamorphosis is active.

nodes.name: Felfire Haste
nodes.description: Fel Rush increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Infernal Armor
nodes.description: Immolation Aura increases your armor by 10% and causes melee attackers to suffer 2 Fire damage.

choices.name: Burn It Out
choices.description: Immolation Aura removes 1 Disease effect.

choices.name: Soul Cleanse
choices.description: Immolation Aura removes 1 Curse effect.

nodes.name: Lost in Darkness
nodes.description: Spectral Sight has 5 sec reduced cooldown and no longer reduces movement speed.

nodes.name: Illidari Knowledge
nodes.description: Reduces magic damage taken by 3%.

nodes.name: Felbound
nodes.description: Your movement speed is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Will of the Illidari
nodes.description: Increases maximum health by 3%.

nodes.name: Internal Struggle
nodes.description: Increases your mastery by 2.6%.

nodes.name: Furious
nodes.description: Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.

nodes.name: Remorseless
nodes.description: Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.

nodes.name: First In, Last Out
nodes.description: Shift grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Erratic Felheart
nodes.description: The cooldown of Fel Rush is reduced by 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Final Breath
nodes.description: Fully channeling Void Ray increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

nodes.name: Darkness
nodes.description:
Summons darkness around you in an 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec.

Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.

nodes.name: Demon Muzzle
nodes.description: Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Soul Splitter
nodes.description: Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 2% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.

nodes.name: Wings of Wrath
nodes.description: Glide speed increased by 10%.

choices.name: Long Night
choices.description: Increases the duration of Darkness by 3 sec.

choices.name: Pitch Black
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.

nodes.name: Demonic Resilience
nodes.description: Blur gains 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Fel Devastation
nodes.description: Unleash the fel within you, damaging enemies directly in front of you for 161 Fire damage over 2 sec.

nodes.name: Spirit Bomb
nodes.description: Consume up to 5 Soul Fragments then explode, dealing 70 Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased by 20% per fragment consumed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Fiery Brand
nodes.description: Brand yourself and an enemy target with demonic symbols, reducing the damage you take by 40% and instantly dealing 142 Fire damage to the enemy.

nodes.name: Perfectly Balanced Glaive
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fracture by 1 sec and Throw Glaive by 6 sec.

nodes.name: Quickened Sigils
nodes.description: Your Sigils activate 1 second faster.

nodes.name: Ascending Flame
nodes.description: Sigil of Flame damage increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Tempered Steel
nodes.description: Physical damage increased by 12%.

nodes.name: Calcified Spikes
nodes.description: Demon Spikes reduces damage taken by 5% while active.

choices.name: Roaring Fire
choices.description: Fel Devastation heals you for up to 50% more, based on your missing health.

choices.name: Sigil of Silence
choices.description:
Place a Sigil of Silence at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Silences all enemies affected by the sigil for 2 sec.

nodes.name: Retaliation
nodes.description: While Demon Spikes is active, melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take 10 Physical damage. Generates high threat.

nodes.name: Felfire Fist
nodes.description: Activating Infernal Strike out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat places a Sigil of Flame at the target location.

nodes.name: Sigil of Spite
nodes.description:
Place a demonic sigil at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Detonates to deal 241 Chaos damage and shatter up to 3 Soul Fragments from enemies affected by the sigil. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Agonizing Flames
nodes.description: Immolation Aura increases your movement speed by 10% and its duration is increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Feed the Demon
nodes.description: Every 20 Fury spent reduces the remaining cooldown of Demon Spikes by 1.00 sec.

nodes.name: Burning Blood
nodes.description: Fire damage increased by 8%.

nodes.name: Revel in Pain
nodes.description:
5.0% of your Fire damage shields you, up to a maximum of 3,055.

Shield and maximum values are doubled while Fiery Brand is active.

nodes.name: Frailty
nodes.description:
Enemies struck by Sigil of Flame, Soul Cleave, and Spirit Bomb are afflicted with Frailty for 8 sec.

You heal for 8% of all damage you deal to targets with Frailty.

nodes.name: Feast of Souls
nodes.description: Soul Cleave heals for an additional 63.

nodes.name: Fallout
nodes.description: Immolation Aura's initial burst has a chance to shatter Soul Fragments from enemies.

nodes.name: Ruinous Bulwark
nodes.description: Fel Devastation heals for an additional 10%, and 50% of its healing is converted into an absorb shield for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Volatile Flameblood
nodes.description:
Immolation Aura has 10% increased critical strike chance and generates 1-5 Fury when it deals critical damage.

This effect may only occur once per 1 sec.

choices.name: Soul Barrier
choices.description: Spirit Bomb shields you for 10 sec, absorbing 2,444 damage plus 611 for each Soul Fragment consumed.

choices.name: Soul Sigils
choices.description: Afflicting an enemy with a Sigil generates 1 Soul Fragment.

nodes.name: Fel Flame Fortification
nodes.description: You take 10% reduced magic damage while Immolation Aura is active.

nodes.name: Void Reaver
nodes.description: Frailty now also reduces all damage you take from afflicted targets by 5%.

nodes.name: Painbringer
nodes.description: Consuming a Soul Fragment reduces all damage you take by 3% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Sigil of Chains
nodes.description:
Place a Sigil of Chains at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

All enemies affected by the sigil are pulled to its center and are snared, reducing movement speed by 70% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Fiery Demise
nodes.description: Fiery Brand also increases Fire damage you deal to the target by 15%.

nodes.name: Chains of Anger
nodes.description: Increases the duration of your Sigils by 2 sec and radius by 2 yds.

nodes.name: Focused Cleave
nodes.description: Soul Cleave deals 60% increased damage to your primary target.

nodes.name: Soulmonger
nodes.description: When consuming a Soul Fragment would heal you above full health it shields you instead, up to a maximum of 3,055.

nodes.name: Stoke the Flames
nodes.description: Fel Devastation damage increased by 30%.

nodes.name: Burning Alive
nodes.description: Every 1 sec, Fiery Brand spreads to one nearby enemy.

nodes.name: Cycle of Binding
nodes.description: Your Sigils have 15% reduced cooldowns.

nodes.name: Vulnerability
nodes.description: Frailty now also increases all damage you deal to afflicted targets by 3%.

nodes.name: Vengeful Beast
nodes.description: Metamorphosis has 5 sec increased duration and increases the damage of Fracture, Soul Cleave, and Spirit Bomb by 20%.

nodes.name: Charred Flesh
nodes.description: Immolation Aura damage increases the duration of your Fiery Brand and Sigil of Flame by 0.25 sec.

nodes.name: Soulcrush
nodes.description: The effects of Frailty are doubled.

nodes.name: Soul Carver
nodes.description: Carve into the soul of your target, dealing 171 Fire damage and an additional 106 Fire damage over 3 sec.  Immediately shatters 3 Soul Fragments from the target and 1 additional Soul Fragment every 1 sec.

nodes.name: Last Resort
nodes.description:
Sustaining fatal damage instead transforms you to Metamorphosis form.

This may occur once every 8 min.

nodes.name: Darkglare Boon
nodes.description: When Fel Devastation finishes fully channeling, it refreshes 15-30% of its cooldown and refunds 15-30 Fury.

nodes.name: Down in Flames
nodes.description: Fiery Brand has 12 sec reduced cooldown and 1 additional charge.

ranks.description: Soul Cleave and Spirit Bomb have a chance per soul fragment consumed to grant Untethered Rage, allowing Metamorphosis to be cast without incurring its cooldown and lasting 10 sec.
Soul Cleave and Spirit Bomb can consume an additional soul fragment and deal an additional 5% damage for each consumed.

Each cast of Soul Cleave and Spirit Bomb that does not grant Untethered Rage instead applies a stack of Seething Anger.

Seething Anger grants 1% Agility and increases your chance to gain Untethered Rage. Lasts 12 sec and cannot be refreshed after gaining Untethered Rage.

nodes.name: Incisive Blade
nodes.description: Soul Cleave deals 10% increased damage.

choices.name: Army Unto Oneself
choices.description: Felblade surrounds you with a Blade Ward, reducing damage taken by 10% for 5 sec.

choices.name: Incorruptible Spirit
choices.description: Each Soul Fragment you consume shields you for an additional 15% of the amount healed.

nodes.name: Wounded Quarry
nodes.description: Expose weaknesses in the target of your Reaver's Mark, causing your Physical damage to any enemy to also deal 30% of the damage dealt to your marked target as Chaos, and sometimes shatter a Soul Fragment.

nodes.name: Fury of the Aldrachi
nodes.description:
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Soul Cleave casts 3 additional glaive slashes to nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

If cast after Shear, cast 6 slashes instead.

nodes.name: Reaver's Mark
nodes.description:
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Shear applies Reaver's Mark, which causes the target to take 7% increased damage for 20 sec. Max 2 stacks.

Applies 1 additional stack of Reaver's Mark If cast after Soul Cleave.

nodes.name: Bladecraft
nodes.description:
Fury of the Aldrachi further empowers Blade Dance when cast after Chaos Strike, increasing slashes to 12.

Reaver's Mark now stacks up to 2 times and further empowers Chaos Strike when cast after Blade Dance, applying an additional stack.

choices.description: Reaver's Glaive generates 20 Fury.

choices.name: Preemptive Strike
choices.description: Throw Glaive deals 7 Physical damage to enemies near its initial target.

choices.description: Vengeful Retreat can be cast a second time within 3 sec.

choices.description: Vengeful Retreat resets the cooldown of Felblade.

nodes.description: Consuming a Soul Fragment causes your next Shear to deal 21 additional Physical damage.

nodes.description: The Hunt shatters 1 Soul Fragment. Blade Dance and Chaos Strike have a 15% chance to shatter a Soul Fragment.

nodes.description: Your first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing 2,308 Cosmic damage over 6 sec.

nodes.name: Final Hour
nodes.description: Passive bonuses granted by each stack of Voidfall persist for 8 sec after being consumed.

nodes.name: Meteoric Fall
nodes.description: While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.

nodes.name: Mass Acceleration
nodes.description: Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Reap upon activating Void Metamorphosis.

choices.name: Path to Oblivion
choices.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 3% increased movement speed.

choices.name: State of Matter
choices.description: Shift has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Voidfall
nodes.description:
Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.

Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing 675 Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Doomsayer
choices.description: Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.

choices.name: Harness the Cosmos
choices.description: Voidfall Meteor damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Celestial Echoes
nodes.description: Consume generates 2 additional Fury and deals 15% increased damage.

nodes.name: Phase Shift
nodes.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% reduced damage taken.

nodes.name: Catastrophe
nodes.description: Enemies struck by a Voidfall Meteor take an additional 25% damage over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Swift Erasure
nodes.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% Haste.

nodes.name: Meteoric Rise
nodes.description:
Void Ray damage increased by 15%.

Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.
